prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-BEACHDIGBPKIT-BUN Product Type: METAL_DETECTOR Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 20pc Beach Combing Metal Detector Gold Panning Kit with Serrated Digger Description: Get in on the gold rush and add the ASR Outdoor Beach Digger Gold Panning Kit to your summer activity list. This gold panning kit has everything you need from gold recovery to gold storage, making it an accessible and comprehensive assortment of gold panning tools for beginners or seasoned gold prospectors alike. The gold panning kit includes twenty-one pieces to help you in your gold, gem or mineral recovery efforts:

- x1 black drawstring bag
- x1 1/20" Mesh Classifier Sifting Screen
- x1 orange sand scoop
- x1 10bs magnetic separator tool
- x1 pen separator
- x4 plastic pipettes
- x2 magnifier tweezers
- x1 green steel sand digger
- x6 glass vials
- x2 small plastic snifter bottle

This gold prospecting beach digger kit is great for a beach comb. Take it to your local beach, lake or riverbed, this gold panning kit is specifically great for sandy areas because of the included orange plastic sand scoop, as well as the green steel digger shovel to help you dig through sand and other rocky material deposits.

The gold panning equipment and tools included in the gold mining kit are made from quality materials. From the high impact, durable plastic gold pan and sand scoop to the metal magnifying tweezers and green steel digger shovel; all these gold mining tools will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come. And, conveniently, all the gold panning kit components mentioned above fit into the black drawstring backpack, so you can easily tote and pack the kit with you for outdoor day trips, camping adventures, family beach days, and much more.

Happy prospecting. Search Terms: sand sifting tool classifier screen set gem collecting rock hound adventure mineral collection outdoor gifts dad scoop carry travel dune magnifier stone precious metal jewel combing separator silt dirt vial detector sack complete digging pickup gold Features: - GOLD RUSH READY: Get ready to mine for gold on your next gold panning adventure with the ASR Outdoor Beach Digger Kit; this gold panning kit has everything you need from gold recovery to gold storage, making it an accessible and comprehensive assortment of gold panning tools for beginners or seasoned gold prospectors alike - KIT INCLUDES: The gold panning kit includes one black drawstring bag, one orange sand scoop, one 16lbs pick up tool, one pen separator, four plastic pipettes, two magnifier tweezers, one green steel sand digger, six glass vials and two small plastic snifter bottle; 21 total units - PERFECT FOR A BEACH COMB: Take this gold panning kit to your local beach, lake or river to mine for gold; this kit is great for a beach comb, specifically with the included orange plastic sand scoop and green steel digger shovel to help you dig through sand and other rocky materials - COMPACT AND PORTABLE: The ASR Outdoor gold panning beach digger kit conveniently fits all the gold prospecting kit equipment and tools in the included black drawstring backpack, so you can easily tote and pack the kit with you for day trips, camping adventures, beach days and much more - TOP GEAR EQUIPMENT: All the equipment in this gold panning beach digger kit is made from quality material from the high impact, durable plastic gold pan and sand scoop to the metal magnifying tweezers and green steel digger shovel; all these gold mining tools will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
